summary: Completed comprehensive testing of fish tooltip functionality on rebirth page. All desktop hover and mobile click interactions working correctly with proper tooltip content display.
passed_tests: Rebirth page loads with all 10 rebirth cards showing fish names as blue interactive links
Hover over 'Goldfish' in Rebirth 1 shows tooltip with fish image, name 'Goldfish', rarity 'COMMON', location 'Sunlight Zone'
Hover over 'Mermaid' in Rebirth 7 shows tooltip with fish image, name 'Mermaid', rarity 'DIVINE', location 'Atlantis'
Hover over 'Hammerhead' in Rebirth 4 shows tooltip with fish image, name 'Hammerhead', rarity 'MYTHICAL', location 'Deep Ocean'
Click on fish name opens tooltip on mobile viewport (390px wide)
Click outside tooltip closes it properly
Multiple fish in same rebirth card (Lionfish, Seahorse in Rebirth 2) both have working tooltips
Homepage loads correctly with no regressions
Navigation from homepage to rebirth page works correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
